Plaintiffs Approval Of Final/Fairness Hearing. Off calendar, duplicate entry. =(302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion For Order Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiffs Kenneth Ferrari and Gordon Fields on behalf of themselves and all others similarly situated Motion for Order Granting Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement and to enter Final Judgment thereon is Granted. The motion papers provide more than sufficient support for all the relief sought. No opposition filed. Since the court intends to sign the proposed order, no appearance is required. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion For Order Granting Award Of Attys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Plaintiffs Kenneth Ferrari and Gordon Fields' Motion for Order Granting Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs, Enhancement Payments to the Class Representatives and Claims Administration Expenses is Granted. The motion papers provide more than sufficient support for all the relief sought. No opposition filed. Since the court intends to sign the proposed order, no appearance is required. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
